title: Iteration Protocols, Generators, and Lazy Evaluation · Effects Clinic: Generator Cleanup
summary: Process records larger than memory while exposing malformed rows at a controlled boundary. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp generator cleanup increment in a bounded-memory lazy ingestion pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Close generators and preserve cleanup behavior during early exit and exceptions.
Prevent accidental exhaustion, duplicate consumption, and hidden ordering dependencies.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

U = TypeVar('U')

steps.title: Predict Generator Cleanup
